description: Tooling-only opaque source manifest for cross-site accessScan corpus seeding. Production src modules must not import this file. oracleEvidenceDigest is auditable without retaining raw artifacts: recapture a fresh oracle payload and run `pnpm corpus:seed --verify-digest --id <site-id> --artifact <path>`; verification fails closed on mismatch and must not leave raw oracle artifacts committed.
